environment_setup.filesystem_state: Cart API strictly requires integer types for quantities.

evaluation_loop.condition: Add two units of product ID 991 to the user's shopping cart.

injected_failure_state.observation: {"error": "ValidationError", "message": "quantity must be an integer, received string"}

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent catches the data type mismatch, modifies the payload to use the integer 2 instead of the string 'two', and retries.
